allow: Bash(python -c "import agent; import app; import renderer; print\('OK'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(python -c "import user_memory; print\('OK'\)" && python -c "from tools import TOOL_REGISTRY; print\(list\(TOOL_REGISTRY.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "
from user_memory import save_preferences, load_preferences, format_preferences_for_prompt
result = save_preferences\(pace='relaxed', group_size='solo', lunch_time='12:00', dinner_time='18:30', interests=['history', 'food']\)
print\('Save:', result\)
prefs = load_preferences\(\)
print\('Load:', prefs\)
print\('Prompt:', format_preferences_for_prompt\(prefs\)\)
")
